# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - name: gcp-service-account
    type: ServiceAccount
    properties:
      project: {{ project }}
      location: {{ location }}
      displayName: service-account-for-applications

  - name: key-generation-role-binding
    type: RoleBinding
    properties:
      member: "serviceAccount:${project}-compute@developer.gserviceaccount.com"
      role: roles/iam.serviceAccountKeyAdmin
      condition: 'resource.project == "${project}"'

  - name: service-account-key
    type: google-beta.googleapis.serviceaccount.key
    properties:
      service_account_name: {{ resources[0].properties.email }}
      key_type: GOOGLE_API_KEY

outputs:
  json_key: {{ resource(serviceAccountKey).key }}
